privacy.title: Privacy Policy
section1Items: Learning progress data (term mastery, quiz results)
privacy.section2Intro: We use collected information for the following purposes:
privacy.section3Text: User data is stored in Supabase's secure database, protected by Row Level Security (RLS) to prevent access by other users. Passwords are stored in hashed form.
privacy.section4Text: We do not share personal information with third parties except as required by law.
privacy.section5Text: This service uses browser local storage for authentication session management. We do not use cookies for tracking purposes.
privacy.section6Text: For privacy-related questions, please contact the service administrator.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.section1Text: DIGITARIA ("the Service") is a web application for learning programming terms. The Service is provided for educational purposes, and users agree to these terms before use.
terms.section2Text: Account registration is required to use the Service. Users are responsible for managing their email and password. Accounts may be suspended if misuse is detected.
section3Items: Unauthorized use or attacks on the system
terms.section4Text: The Service is provided "as is." We do not guarantee the accuracy or completeness of content. We are not liable for damages arising from use of the Service.
terms.section5Text: These terms may be changed without notice. Updated terms take effect when posted on this page.
